name: next
description: Next.js CLI to start, build and export your application

subcommands.name: build
subcommands.description: Create an optimized production build of your application

args.name: dir
args.description: Represent the directory of the Next.js application

subcommands.name: dev
subcommands.description: Start the application in development mode

args.name: dir
args.description: Represent the directory of the Next.js application

name: -p
--port
options.description: A port number on which to start the application

name: -H
--hostname
options.description: Hostname on which to start the application

subcommands.name: start
subcommands.description: Start the application in production mode

args.name: dir
args.description: Represent the directory of the Next.js application

name: -p
--port
options.description: A port number on which to start the application

name: -H
--hostname
options.description: Hostname on which to start the application

subcommands.name: export
subcommands.description: Exports the application for production deployment

args.name: dir
args.description: Represent the directory of the Next.js application

options.name: -s
options.description: Do not print any messages to console

subcommands.name: telemetry
subcommands.description: Allows you to control Next.js' telemetry collection

args.name: status
args.description: Turn Next.js' telemetry collection on or off
